results.title: World Cup final draws record 63 million U.S. viewers
results.description: The round of 16 meeting between England and Mexico drew nearly 45 million viewers, well above the roughly 27 million who watched Game 7 of the 2025 MLB World Series.

results.title: Cavaliers Get Promising News On LeBron James’ Free Agency
results.description: The Cleveland Cavaliers are once again the favorites to land LeBron James in free agency after a recent change in the prediction market. Polymarket had a major change over the past few days that saw the Miami Heat passing Cleveland as the top LeBron choice. However, today’s shift saw the Cavaliers going back to first [...] The post Cavaliers Get Promising News On LeBron James’ Free Agency appeared first on HEAVY.

results.title: Glasgow welcomes the Commonwealth Games back - but can the city recapture the magic of 2014?
results.description: As the opening ceremony approaches, residents are weighing nostalgia for 2014 against hopes of another warm Scottish welcome.

results.title: Ex-NFL player Feely projected to win Arizona's first district U.S. House primary
Rocker allows 1 hit over 6 innings and Rangers get season-high 18 hits in 10-0 rout of White Sox
results.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Kumar Rocker pitched one-hit ball over six innings for his first win in his last 10 games, Brandon Nimmo homered among his four hits and the Texas Rangers routed the Chicago White Sox 10-0 on Tuesday night. results.title: Parramatta coach upbeat about Jarome Luai signing
results.description: The impending arrival of Jarome Luai has given Parramatta coach Jason Ryles extra reason to be excited for the 2027 NRL season.
